summary: Loaded with players hitting their peak years — a 4-3-3 / 4-4-2 that crosses to Sørloth & Haaland and is deadly in transition. Their best chance to do something special.
style: 4-3-3 / 4-4-2 — wing-play 1v1 (if 4-3-3, Sørloth rolls inside as a 2nd CF), crosses into Sørloth & Haaland, deadly in transition and in behind, with defensive discipline & rest-defence.

counterReliance.note: Deadly in transition & in behind, but crosses to big strikers too

strengths: Deadly in transition and in behind

keyPlayers.name: Antonio Nusa
keyPlayers.note: Goals, assists & creativity — pacey, skilful dribbler who works back and counters at speed

tactics: Get the wide players 1v1, cross to the strikers and break at pace in transition, all on a disciplined defensive base. So much potential and a peak-years core — their best chance to do something special.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
